legend.automated: Verified in the authoring DOM by an it() block (graceful when the Import-From-Library feature is flag-gated).
legend.deferred: Documented as it.skip() — requires Reader/Preview runtime aggregation, teacher reports, persistence, publish, or activity-creation/login flows.
